title: aspidium auritum
intro: Aspidium auritum, also known as the Golden Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and is characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and golden-brown stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium auritum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
